title: OmniProject report
description: A report / visualisation type. One file per report under assets/reports/<id>.json.

renderer.description: How the report is realised. Every report is a JSON definition bound to a registered renderer; the only report logic left in code is the reusable renderer components + the no-code engine/editor.

engine.description: builtin = a registered bespoke React component; custom = the generic no-code report engine (fully editable pipeline).

component.description: For engine=builtin: the registered renderer component name (must exist in the SPA report-renderers registry).

surfacedVia.description: The report is reached through another plane (e.g. a board view), not a Reports-page card.

reason.description: Why it is surfaced elsewhere (accompanies surfacedVia).

definition.description: For engine=custom: the declarative pipeline (scope, groupBy, metrics, filter, viz).

requiresCapability.description: Backend capability domain this report needs, or null = always available (no type constraint: string | null).

methodologies.description: Methodology TAGS this report belongs to ("*" or omitted = neutral / all).

order.description: Display order in the report picker.
